info.title: Inventory Service
info.description:
Inventory management: item master, stock receipts (FIFO), issues, transfers, adjustments, reservations, cycle counts, UoM, locations, labels, revisions, reorder policies, valuation snapshots, lot/serial traceability, lot genealogy, expiry monitoring, status transfers.

**Authentication:** Bearer JWT. Tenant identity derived from JWT claims (not headers). Permissions: `INVENTORY_READ` for queries, `INVENTORY_MUTATE` for writes.

**Idempotency:** POST endpoints accept `idempotency_key` in the request body. 201 = created, 200 = replay (same key + same body), 409 = conflict (same key + different body).

201.description: Cycle count task created with snapshot lines

404.description: Item not found or wrong tenant
No revision effective at requested time

422.description: Only draft revisions can be updated

404.description: Item not found or wrong tenant

actor_id.description: Identity of the actor performing this change (for audit trail).

allow_negative.description:
When true, allows a negative delta even if it would drive on_hand below zero.
Default: false (no-negative policy enforced).

idempotency_key.description: Caller-supplied idempotency key (required; scoped per tenant)

location_id.description:
Optional storage location within the warehouse (bin, shelf, zone).
When absent, the adjustment is location-agnostic — existing behavior.

quantity_delta.description:
Signed quantity change (positive = gain, negative = shrinkage/write-off).
Must not be zero.

reason.description:
Human-readable reason for the adjustment (required).
Examples: "shrinkage", "cycle_count_correction", "damaged_write_off"

AdjustResult.description: Result returned on successful or replayed adjustment

adjustment_id.description: Stable business key for this adjustment (inv_adjustments.id)

ApiError.description:
Standard API error envelope.

`error` is a machine-readable code (`not_found`, `validation_error`, etc.).
`message` is human-readable.  `request_id` is populated from the tracing
context already present in request extensions.  `details` carries per-field
errors for 422 responses.

ConsumedLayer.description:
One FIFO layer consumed during an issue.

`extended_cost_minor` is precomputed: `quantity * unit_cost_minor`.

unit_cost_minor.description: Cost per unit from this layer, minor currency units

factor.description: Multiply from_uom quantity by this factor to get to_uom quantity. Must be > 0.

cogs_account_ref.description: GL account ref for COGS expense (e.g. "5000")

inventory_account_ref.description: GL account ref for inventory asset (e.g. "1200")

tracking_mode.description: Lot/serial tracking mode. Required; immutable after creation.

variance_account_ref.description: GL account ref for purchase price variance (e.g. "5010")

actor_id.description: Identity of the actor performing this change (for audit trail).

CreateSnapshotRequest.description: Request to build a valuation snapshot.

location_id.description: None = warehouse-level roll-up; Some = location-scoped header

item_ids.description: Required when scope = partial; ignored (and safe to omit) for full.

idempotency_key.description: Caller-supplied idempotency key (required; scoped per tenant)

quantity.description: Optional partial fulfillment quantity (defaults to the full reserved quantity)

reservation_id.description: UUID of the original reserve row to fulfill

FulfillResult.description: Result returned on successful or replayed fulfillment

fulfillment_id.description: UUID of the compensating fulfillment row

reservation_id.description: UUID of the original reservation that was fulfilled

GenealogyEdge.description: A genealogy edge returned by query functions.

GenealogyResult.description: Result returned on successful split or merge.

extra.description: Optional extra data merged into the label payload (e.g. lot_code).

InvItemStatus.description: The three mutually-exclusive status buckets for stock units.

InventoryLot.description:
A named lot grouping a batch of items received together.

Lots are unique per (tenant_id, item_id, lot_code).
Created on receipt; immutable thereafter (lot_code and item_id never change).

attributes.description: Optional free-form metadata stored as JSON (e.g. expiry date, supplier info).

expires_on.description: First-class lot expiry date used for policy enforcement and alerting.

expiry_source.description: Source of expiry assignment: manual or policy.

lot_code.description: Human-readable lot identifier (e.g. "LOT-2026-001", supplier batch code).

idempotency_key.description: Caller-supplied idempotency key (required; scoped per tenant)

location_id.description:
Optional storage location to issue from. When set, availability is
checked against this location's on-hand projection. When absent,
availability is derived from warehouse-level FIFO layers (existing behavior).

lot_code.description: Required for Lot-tracked items. FIFO consumption is restricted to this lot only.

quantity.description:
Quantity to issue (must be > 0 for None/Lot-tracked items).
For Serial-tracked items, quantity is derived from serial_codes.len().

serial_codes.description:
Required for Serial-tracked items. Each code must be on_hand for this item.
Quantity is derived from this list; the `quantity` field is ignored.

uom_id.description:
UoM id for the input `quantity`. When present, `quantity` is in this unit
and will be converted to the item's base_uom before writing to the ledger.
When absent, `quantity` is assumed to already be in base_uom units.

IssueResult.description: Result returned on successful or replayed issue

issue_line_id.description: Stable business key for this issue (= ledger entry_id)

Item.description: A unique item (SKU) per tenant with GL account references.

base_uom_id.description:
FK into `uoms` catalog — the item's canonical stock unit.
None until assigned via the UoM catalog.

tracking_mode.description: How stock movements are tracked. Immutable after creation.

ItemUomConversion.description:
A directional conversion factor between two UoMs for a specific item.

Semantics: `quantity_in_from_uom * factor = quantity_in_to_uom`
Example: 1 box = 12 ea → from=box, to=ea, factor=12.0

LotMergeRequest.description:
Input for a lot merge operation.

A merge takes multiple parent lots and combines their quantity into a
single child lot. The child lot is created if it doesn't already exist.

LotSplitRequest.description:
Input for a lot split operation.

A split takes one parent lot and distributes quantity to one or more
child lots. Child lots are created if they don't already exist.

MovementEntry.description:
A single ledger movement returned by the history query.

Includes both the business reference (`reference_type` / `reference_id`)
and the originating event reference (`source_event_id` / `source_event_type`).

entry_id.description: Immutable UUID for the ledger row (unique across all ledger entries).

ledger_id.description: Stable monotonic ordering key (BIGSERIAL primary key of inventory_ledger).

location_id.description: Location (bin/shelf) if the movement was location-aware; NULL otherwise.

posted_at.description: Wall-clock time at which the movement was posted.

quantity.description: Signed quantity: positive = stock in, negative = stock out.

reference_id.description: Optional business reference ID (e.g. the PO or SO number).

source_event_id.description: UUID of the outbox event that caused this ledger entry.

unit_cost_minor.description: Unit cost in minor currency units (e.g. cents).

PaginatedResponse_InventoryLot.description:
Generic paginated response envelope.

Every list endpoint returns this wrapper so consumers get consistent
pagination metadata regardless of the underlying entity type.

items.description:
A named lot grouping a batch of items received together.

Lots are unique per (tenant_id, item_id, lot_code).
Created on receipt; immutable thereafter (lot_code and item_id never change).

attributes.description: Optional free-form metadata stored as JSON (e.g. expiry date, supplier info).

expires_on.description: First-class lot expiry date used for policy enforcement and alerting.

expiry_source.description: Source of expiry assignment: manual or policy.

lot_code.description: Human-readable lot identifier (e.g. "LOT-2026-001", supplier batch code).

PaginatedResponse_Item.description:
Generic paginated response envelope.

Every list endpoint returns this wrapper so consumers get consistent
pagination metadata regardless of the underlying entity type.

items.description: A unique item (SKU) per tenant with GL account references.

base_uom_id.description:
FK into `uoms` catalog — the item's canonical stock unit.
None until assigned via the UoM catalog.

tracking_mode.description: How stock movements are tracked. Immutable after creation.

PaginatedResponse_ItemRevision.description:
Generic paginated response envelope.

Every list endpoint returns this wrapper so consumers get consistent
pagination metadata regardless of the underlying entity type.

PaginatedResponse_Label.description:
Generic paginated response envelope.

Every list endpoint returns this wrapper so consumers get consistent
pagination metadata regardless of the underlying entity type.

PaginatedResponse_Location.description:
Generic paginated response envelope.

Every list endpoint returns this wrapper so consumers get consistent
pagination metadata regardless of the underlying entity type.

PaginatedResponse_ReorderPolicy.description:
Generic paginated response envelope.

Every list endpoint returns this wrapper so consumers get consistent
pagination metadata regardless of the underlying entity type.

max_qty.description: Optional upper bound for order-to-max workflows.

reorder_point.description: Quantity on hand at which a restock should be triggered.

safety_stock.description: Minimum buffer quantity to keep on hand at all times.

PaginatedResponse_ValuationSnapshot.description:
Generic paginated response envelope.

Every list endpoint returns this wrapper so consumers get consistent
pagination metadata regardless of the underlying entity type.

items.description:
A point-in-time valuation roll-up for a tenant's warehouse (or location).

`total_value_minor` is the pre-computed sum of all associated
`ValuationLine.total_value_minor` entries.

as_of.description: The instant at which FIFO layers were evaluated.

total_value_minor.description: Sum of all line `total_value_minor` values, in minor currency units.

correlation_id.description: Distributed trace correlation ID (optional; generated if absent)

idempotency_key.description: Caller-supplied idempotency key (required; scoped per tenant)

location_id.description:
Optional storage location within the warehouse (bin, shelf, zone).
When absent, the receipt is location-agnostic — existing behavior.

lot_code.description:
Required when item.tracking_mode == Lot.
Identifies the lot; creates the lot row if it does not exist yet.

serial_codes.description:
Required when item.tracking_mode == Serial.
Length MUST equal `quantity`; each code must be unique per tenant+item.

source_type.description:
Origin of receipt: "purchase" (default) | "production" | "return".
Production receipts require caller-provided unit_cost.

unit_cost_minor.description: Unit cost in minor currency units, e.g. cents (must be > 0)

uom_id.description:
UoM id for the input `quantity`. When present, `quantity` is in this unit
and will be converted to the item's base_uom before writing to the ledger.
When absent, `quantity` is assumed to already be in base_uom units.

ReceiptResult.description: Result returned on successful or replayed receipt

event_id.description: Event id used in outbox (also = ledger.source_event_id)

ledger_entry_id.description: BIGSERIAL ledger row id (used for FIFO ordering)

lot_id.description: Lot id, present when item.tracking_mode == Lot.

receipt_line_id.description: Stable business key for this receipt (from ledger.entry_id)

serial_instance_ids.description:
Serial instance ids created, in the same order as request.serial_codes.
Empty for non-serial items.

idempotency_key.description: Caller-supplied idempotency key (required; scoped per tenant)

reservation_id.description: UUID of the original reserve row to compensate

ReleaseResult.description: Result returned on successful or replayed release

release_id.description: UUID of the compensating reservation row (release entry)

reservation_id.description: UUID of the original reservation that was released

max_qty.description: Optional upper bound for order-to-max workflows.

reorder_point.description: Quantity on hand at which a restock should be triggered.

safety_stock.description: Minimum buffer quantity to keep on hand at all times.

idempotency_key.description: Caller-supplied idempotency key (required; scoped per tenant)

ReserveResult.description: Result returned on successful or replayed reserve

reservation_id.description: UUID of the created reservation row (primary entry)

SourceRef.description: Source reference: who triggered this issue.

StatusTransferResult.description: Result returned on successful or replayed transfer

transfer_id.description: Stable business key for this transfer (inv_status_transfers row id)

SubmitLineInput.description: One line in the submit request (caller supplies counted_qty per line_id).

TrackingMode.description:
How stock movements are tracked for this SKU.

Set at item creation; immutable thereafter (changing tracking_mode after
stock exists would invalidate historical layer associations).

idempotency_key.description: Caller-supplied idempotency key (required; scoped per tenant)

quantity.description: Quantity to transfer (must be > 0; in base_uom units)

TransferResult.description: Result returned on successful or replayed transfer

issue_ledger_id.description: Ledger entry id for the 'transfer_out' leg (source debit)

receipt_ledger_id.description: Ledger entry id for the 'transfer_in' leg (destination credit)

total_cost_minor.description: Total FIFO cost consumed from source layers

transfer_id.description: Stable business key for this transfer (= inv_transfers.id)

Uom.description: A unit of measure in the tenant's catalog (e.g. "ea", "kg", "box").

max_qty.description: Pass Some(value) to set; None leaves the existing value unchanged.

actor_id.description: Identity of the actor performing this change (for audit trail).

ValuationLine.description:
One line under a `ValuationSnapshot` — value for a single item/location.

`total_value_minor = quantity_on_hand * unit_cost_minor` (pre-computed).
`unit_cost_minor` is the weighted-average unit cost of remaining FIFO layers.

location_id.description: `None` when not tracking at location level for this snapshot.

quantity_on_hand.description: Remaining on-hand quantity at `as_of` (sum of layer `quantity_remaining`).

unit_cost_minor.description: Weighted-average unit cost across remaining FIFO layers at `as_of`.

ValuationSnapshot.description:
A point-in-time valuation roll-up for a tenant's warehouse (or location).

`total_value_minor` is the pre-computed sum of all associated
`ValuationLine.total_value_minor` entries.

as_of.description: The instant at which FIFO layers were evaluated.

total_value_minor.description: Sum of all line `total_value_minor` values, in minor currency units.
